entry.title: Re: Task 7 - Using CQL in an unbound function implementation (July Developer Challenge - "Rever
entry.content:
Im running into an issue and getting a little stuck. Do you have any tips?

If I test the developed services with cds watch 'local' in BAS then I get a succesfull answer.

When I deploy to cloud foundry I get an sqlite error that the CompanyName column of Suppliers is not present.

If I expand the standard Products odata to CompanyName then it does work...

So it seems that sqlite is not putting up with my SELECT statement in my function.

Any idea?

entry.title: Re: Data conversion in the target system or in the source...
entry.content: Data conversion can be done in the target or source system based on factors like new features, limitations, data cleansing, and migration strategy. Assessing requirements and capabilities of both systems is important to determine the best approach, which may involve a combination of both.

entry.title: Sloc to sloc against the bin to bin transfer
entry.content:
Hi experts,

Business have two Slocs -0099, 018T, below that we have single warehouse 800 and storage type 200, two bin values BK-FG-99 , 38-01-01. 

Business transfers the Blocked stock from 0099 location to 018T within the two bins.

In system development - A material doc. will be created with the mvt type 325 and with the ref of PCN number from material doc we are creating and confirming the TO from source bin to intrim bin . Next 999 mvt transaction is posted and TO will get confirmed from intrim bin to destination bin.

As per the mentioned above system development process the to the destination bin the TO is not getting created.

Kinldy suggest any alternative process.

Thanks,
Saikumar

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation – Design, Build, Test, Deploy
entry.content:
We’ve already reached the second half of 2024, meaning we’re rapidly closing in on this year’s SAP ALM Summit EMEA 2024 in Mannheim, Germany (Sep 24-27). At the upcoming edition of this annual event, you’ll hear all about latest developments and innovations in the world of SAP Cloud ALM for implementation. This blog briefly introduces some of the latest advancements, and as you can see below, the new-look launchpad already reveals that quite a bit has changed since last year.

The new-look launchpad in SAP Cloud ALM

 

Major benefits for every customer

SAP Cloud ALM for implementation continues to provide the harmonized implementation for the intelligent enterprise, covering all relevant SAP solutions for cloud-centric customers. Apart from brand new functions introduced this year, all core capabilities and phases have seen improvements and increased functionality over the past 12 months – far too many to list here, so we’ll quickly recap some highlights for you.

SAP Cloud ALM greatly simplifies your implementation needs

 

Tag Assignments to Categorize and Discover

A major improvement related to Tag Management has been adding the possibility to assign tags to certain objects within SAP Cloud ALM. In Process Management, for instance, you can now assign tags to solution processes, and the same is true for custom solution processes in Process Authoring and also for documents. In all cases, tag assignment is intuitive and quick, allowing you to search for existing tags, create new tags, or remove existing assignments if required. You can then display these tags in your lists of objects, and even filter your list results by tags to zoom in on those items you really want to see.

Find related items quickly by assigning appropriate tags

 

Sticking with Process Management, users will be happy to hear they can now create documents for process entities. This is a great step as we continue to migrate existing notes to documents, remembering that the Documents app offers additional capabilities compared to its Notes predecessor and will continue to grow, as explained in this blog from earlier this year.

Additionally, you can now assign a Process Owner to a solution process to easily identify who is responsible for it – particularly useful in case anyone has any questions about a solution process. You can then display the Process Owner information in the list of solution process and also use the Process Owner filter if needed.

Assign, display and filter by Process Owner

 

Finally, the introduction of the new Process Hierarchy Author role (and thus distinguishing it from the existing project author role) means that you can manage authorizations of your process hierarchy and processes in more detail. With the options now also available for assigning process hierarchy nodes, this is a very welcome addition.

 

View Settings and View Management for Flexible Choice

Several apps within SAP Cloud ALM, such as Test Management and Process Management, have introduced View Management (sometimes referred to as Variant Management) into their UIs. When used in combination with other screen features, such as the Adapt Filters button or the new and simplified View Settings dialog that harmonizes grouping, sorting and column display settings across many of the apps in SAP Cloud ALM, users now have the chance to personalize how their results lists and filters are displayed, and create multiple views to save their settings. In addition, users with the right authorization can even save their view as a public view, which can then be reused by all users in the same tenant. Calling up different lists for different purposes has never been simpler.

View Management lets you create and save multiple views

 

Introducing Quality Gates

In Project and Task Management, you can now create Quality Gates and assign them to phases in a project. Here you can choose between creating a checklist manually for a quality gate assessment or uploading one using a spreadsheet template. An overview of your upcoming quality gates is available in the Project Overview, and any action items resulting from the quality gate check can be captured as follow-up tasks. More detailed information about the new quality gates feature can be found in this Blog.

 

Analytics and Reporting: Your Wide-Angled Lens

Last but not least, we’ve also seen some major additions to the area of Analytics, with a new Cross-Project Overview tile, a brand new Process Hierarchy Assignments app, and the new Cross-Project Analysis app, an enhanced remake of the former Release and Timelines application. The latter offers a readiness overview of multiple projects at the same time, allowing users to track statuses both at program level and at project level, quickly identifying how many project elements are completed or still awaiting completion. Process Hierarchy Assignments on the other hand lets you dig deeper into the relationships of your node structures, visualizing the statuses of the elements assigned to each node, as explained in more detail in this blog.

Quickly review element statuses for each node in your process hierarchy

 

Closing Words

As we said above, this was by no means a full list of what’s been added to the world of SAP Cloud ALM for implementation since last year’s ALM Summit, but hopefully it gives you a good taste of the value and features that we continue to add.

To see which innovations are currently planned for the next quarters in SAP Cloud ALM, you can view the up-to-date roadmap in the SAP Road Map Explorer. Please remember that this information is provided as a courtesy, without a warranty, and is not a commitment, promise, or legal obligation to deliver any material, code, or functionality. Nevertheless, it remains a valuable tool for seeing which features are on the horizon.

SAP Road Map Explorer - your guide to what's on the horizon

 

Come along to this year’s ALM Summit to find out more! Sign up today to join us and other top experts at the SAP ALM Summit EMEA 2024 this September in Mannheim. Feel free to share this within your community network and get involved. Thanks as always for reading!

entry.title: Re: Create House Bank
entry.content: Be sure to set up the Bank Key AND the Bank Number (US routing number). They are necessary for ACH to work.

entry.title: Delete error of local copy of app in Work Zone standard
entry.content:
Hello,

we face with an error in SAP Wonk Zone standard when we want to delete a local copy of an app:

"Something went wrong and the content item could not be deleted. Please retry deleting your changes, or close and try again later."

Is there any delete circumstance that is block deleting or is this a service error of the instance which muste be adressed to SAP support?

BR

Reiner

entry.title: Re: New Bank Accounts don't appear in manual bank statement?
entry.content: Issue was resolved by manually process the bank statement and entering manually the new bank accounts during the process. Then, after completing the process, the bank statement has been posted. After posting, I checked the FF67 and found the new bank accounts among the list. Thank you to all of you, who replied & who pass by to read

entry.title: SAP Business One upgrade path - upgraded!
entry.content:
What's changed in SAP Business One upgrade path ?

 

Spoiler
Did you know that it's possible to install the latest SAP Business One 10.0 release from scratch and perform a direct database upgrade from any release of SAP Business One 9.2, 9.3, or 10.0. ?

Now that I've got your attention 😀, I'm happy to share with you our first step (more to come...) in simplification of upgrade process for SAP Business One and SAP Business One version for HANA.

In this initial step, we simplified the upgrade path by taking the following steps:

✔️Officially support direct database upgrade to latest SAP Business One release from any release on SAP Business One version 9.2, 9.3, 10.0 on an environment which was installed from scratch on latest SAP Business One release.

✔️Unified the "Gate" Feature Pack (FP 2208) in upgrade paths that require multiple version jumps.
See Flow chart below taken from Upgrade Strategy Overview .


















SAP Business One recent overview notes have also been updated to outline the simplified up-to-date upgrade path. See below example taken from SAP Business One 10.0 FP 2405 overview  SAP Note 3446770 



💡
As a best practice, it's always recommended to review the Upgrade path information within the overview note to make sure you are up to date with latest changes.

Hope you find this information valuable for your SAP Business One upgrade projects, stay tuned for future announcements on lifecycle management enhancements, more to come... 😀

entry.title: Re: CDS view I_COMPANYCODE extraction to SAP BW4H
entry.content:
May you can modify the CDS view (IFICOMPANYCODE) to filter out company codes with language keys other than DE and EN. This can be done by adding a WHERE clause in the CDS view definition.
Alternatively, you can create a separate CDS view specifically for company codes with language keys DE and EN and use it for extraction to BW4H. The solution depends on your requirements and system flexibility.

entry.title: Re: Posting partial retirement without revenue to asset w...
entry.content:
A possible issue could be with system configuration or settings. To troubleshoot, please verify useful life, salvage value, and depreciation key and a double-check partial retirement details.
Ensure correct GL account and verify settings for asset retirement without revenue.

entry.title: Re: Freight Unit is not created automatically for Sales O...
entry.content:
Hi @Krish01 

The sales order status prevents FU creation - log message "All items have status 'Rejected' or 'No Standard Items'; freight units cannot be built"

The note 3346943 - FU for MM/SD/LE documents integration is not created provides the explanation.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: S4 HANA Public Cloud : How to create Fiori tiles for BTP -BPA form triggers for automations
entry.content:
Hello Community,

We have built form trigger for a process automation that we have built on BTP -Build process automation, we are able to test the form trigger with the generated Url link for the form.

But how can we create a Fiori tile on S4 HANA public cloud Fiori launch pad for this BPA form  where the business users can have access to these tile and trigger the automations.

We have tried to create tile using Custom Catalog but question here is that we can give a static Url in the custom catalog app, but when the BTP sub account is different is for Dev and Prod environments then BPA form link will also be changing. in this case how can we create a Fiori tile which will dynamically points to the correct BPA form in all the environments ( Dev and prod).

SAP Build Process Automation  SAP Build SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP Fiori

entry.title: Re: Extracting more than 5000 records from SE16/SE16N.
entry.content: As I know, by adjusting the "MAX_SEL" parameter value, you can increase the maximum exportable records in SE16/SE16N in S4 Hana 2023.

I am from Germany and living close to Karlsruhe.

entry.title: Re: Freight Unit is not created automatically for Sales O...
entry.content:
HI 

 

as per the report output please check below :

1- sales order or delivery item category has item type 'A' or 'B', 

2- Ensure the items are not text or service, then FU should be generated for standard items.

entry.title: Re: Cloud Integration – How to Connect to an On-Premise sftp server via Cloud Connector
entry.content: Hi, at the present time, we used Oracle SQL Loader to retrieve content of spreadsheet files that are save in a Box Drive, which we go in manually change column to match date time type, and in some other cases delete ones we dont one. Also we convert the .xls file to csv with specific delemiter type to parse the files. We load data to Oracle and later througt SDA we create V tables to load manually the data to SAP HANA in the Cloud. Reading this Blog, it seems this could be easier to load the data to HANA using both the SFTP and Cloud Connector. We have an SAP HANA instance in the Cloud 2.x, we also have the SFTP server configure where we receive these spreadsheet files. Could this methodology work for us? How can I go about implementing this configuration? thanks for all the suggestions.

Hello,

The attribute of Service Quotation can be read using the API 

Service Quotation (A2X)

The attributes in the output PDF should be available in the API.

Warm regards,

Dequan Xu

entry.title: Re: Creating a DLL to run SAP Crystal Reports
entry.content: Any Core framework is not supported, must use 4.7 or 4.8 framework. And please don't post to answered posts

We are starting our Clean Core journey, on a S/4 Hana On Premise solution, with a lot of legacy development (20 years installation).

One part of it is enforcing Abap Cloud Rules in ATC checks.

As we have a lot of legacy codes, we would like to enforce these new ATC checks only on newly created objects at first. Is this feasible ?

Thank you for your insight

entry.title: Re: In-House Repair, Reject quotation, no outbound delivery created

entry.title: Overcoming Challenges in Staffing Customer Projects with SAP Project and Resource Management
entry.content:
One of the main challenges of staffing customer projects is ensuring that you have the right skills and expertise available to meet the specific needs of each project. This can be particularly challenging when customer projects are diverse and require a wide range of technical and functional skills. In order to effectively address this challenge, resource pool managers should maintain a thorough understanding of the skills and capabilities of their available resources. This may involve conducting regular skill assessments, keeping detailed records of each resource's expertise, and staying informed about industry trends and emerging technologies.

Another challenge is managing the availability and workload of resources. It is common for resource pool managers to be responsible for allocating resources across multiple projects simultaneously. This can be a complex task, especially when resources are in high demand and have limited availability. In order to address this challenge, resource pool managers have to prioritize projects based on their strategic importance, assess the availability and workload of resources accurately, and communicate effectively with project managers to ensure that resources are allocated effectively.

Additionally, resource pool managers may encounter challenges related to resource allocation and scheduling. It is essential to ensure that resources are utilized efficiently, and that they are allocated to the right projects at the right time. This may involve developing comprehensive resource allocation plans, establishing clear communication channels with project managers, and being adaptable to changes in project scope and requirements.

In order to overcome these challenges, resource pool managers nowadays have to rely on information technology that enable them to streamline the staffing process and cope with the growing number of resources requests.

SAP has therefore added a new cloud-based solution to it’s solution portfolio “SAP Project and Resource Management ” formerly also known as "SAP S/4HANA Cloud for projects". This solution specifically targets the resource planning and staffing process in service industries, but which can be also applied to any other industry managing large pools of project resources for internal and  customer projects.

SAP’s latest project resource management solution offers three major capabilities to streamline the staffing process for customer projects.

Specify Resource Requirement

The first capability is to specify the resource requirement, which includes details such as the requested period for resources, total effort in hours, and required skill set for the job. This request can be created manually or automatically pre-filled from related projects in SAP S/4HANA cloud such as Professional Service Projects ( Customer Projects)  and Enterprise Projects (planned to be available by August 2024 - Note: Roadmap is subject of change).

Traditional SAP S/4HANA customers with a private cloud or on-premise installation can create project demands in SAP Project and Resource Management using available APIs.

Review Resource Request

Review Resource Request Details

The Resource Manager receives via the resource request all necessary details to start the resource search process, while the resource requestor can retrieve the latest status and validate assignments.

Search and assign resource to request

The second capability is to search and assign resources to the request, where the resource pool manager can compare and assign resources that match the minimum availability and required skill sets. This ensures that resources are allocated efficiently and effectively. Details from the resource request are automatically used to generate a list of matching resources that full fill the minimum availability and required skill sets. In the Comparison View the resource pool manager can compare multiple resources head -to head to check e.g. Proficiency Level for each skill.

Before hitting the assign button the resource pools manager can adjust how much of the demand should be covered by this resource and in which period. The Quick Assign button skips this step and directly assigns the resource to fully cover the required demand.

Resource Comparison View

Comparison View in the Assignment Section of the Resource request

Optimize the utilization

The third capability is to optimize utilization, allowing resource managers to receive an overview of resource utilization in projects and available capacities for additional project work. This helps in distributing workload and achieving better utilization across all resources.

The Manage Utilization view is great way to quickly retrieve the status of the resource pool showing utilization and assignments per planning period and individual resource. Here the resource pool manager is able to drill down to individual project assignments and adjust the assignments, which allows him to distribute the workload in the team and achieve a better utilization across all resources.

Team Utilization

Team Utilization Overview Screen

In order to fully optimize the utilization of a pool of project resources, it is essential to have up-to-date information on their skills and job experience from previous projects. SAP Project and resource Management provides a self-service function that empowers employees to continuously update their skills, qualifications, and proficiency levels after completing new trainings or customer projects.

Resource Profile Page

Maintenance of skills and experiences in Resource Profile View

In conclusion, staffing customer projects as a resource pool manager can be a complex and demanding task. However, by maintaining a comprehensive understanding of available resources, managing resource availability and workload effectively, and leveraging technology to streamline the staffing process, resource pool managers can overcome these challenges and ensure that the right skills and resources are allocated effectively. SAP Project and Resource Management supports organisations with large resources pools to facilitate the collaboration between project managers , resource manager and team members during the entire staffing process. This leads to more accurate information about demands and capacities, shorter staffing cycles and reduced manual backoffice efforts.

For additional information on SAP Project and Resource Management please visit following pages:

Product page on www.sap.com

SAP Community Blog - The Two Project Control Possibilities

SAP Community Blog - How to improve Project Collaboration with Contractors and Suppliers 

SAP Help Portal - SAP Project and Resource Management

@David_Chaviano 

Future ERP consultant here just expressing my gratitude and interest in the Digital Skills Initiative program! I've always been passionate about ERP systems, and SAP stands out as the one I prefer to work with due to its comprehensive and robust capabilities.

Throughout my academic and professional journey, I have actively engaged in projects and internships that have given me practical experience and insights into SAP systems and I am ready to take the next step to get certified. 

Thank You

Regards,

Hagar

entry.title: Organizational Change: Mass Change Profit Center Assignment
entry.content:
Hi All,

We currently have a customer who periodically conducts a profit center reorganization. At the moment, the Manage Organizational Changes app can be used for this purpose. However, we need to manually update the new profit centers for cost centers each time, as described here: 

"The current scope also includes the reassignment of profit centers in cost centers. However, you don’t need to maintain the new profit center to cost center assignment in the Manage Organizational Changes app. Instead, you use the Manage Cost Centers app or the Change Cost Center transaction (KS02) to create a new validity period for a cost center with the new profit center assignment. If the Activate Organizational Change option is selected in the Activate Organizational Change Features Customizing activity, and if a suitable organizational change exists, the new profit center assignment is automatically considered in the organizational change." (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/8fbeed5f2046489696a50ac7fd76f9c6/ed0e1bde97874abea698a105c5109894.html)

Is there a way to perform a mass update of cost centers or a job? Currently, many manual steps are required, making the entire process very error-prone. Is there a best practice for this?

 

Thanks for your help!

entry.title: Re: Vulnerability report of Crystal Reports for Visual Studio SP36
entry.content: Typically CVE's can be false/positives when it comes to CR for VS .NET. And if your app does not use the parts reported there is no concern. But I reported this post to R&D and they'll look into it. Please note, SAP doesn't list the ones that are affected for security reasons obviously. You can get access to the SAP Notes if you have a support contract.

entry.title: Re: DE_CGI_XML_CT_V9: Building number appended to street name
entry.content: Added Finance tag.

entry.title: Re: PRICE CONTROL ACCOUNTING
entry.content: Hello, why are you changing the price control from "S" to "V"? During the actual costing run, the system did not allocate variances that were already included in the Cost of Goods Manufactured (COGM). Changing the price control will prevent the system from posting to the direct material account. Cost split entries are only possible for materials with a standard price. You should transfer your saleable stock to the warehouse location, then proceed with delivery, post goods issue (PGI), and invoice. Then system will post three documents correctly.

entry.title: Getting an error while trying to run the task list SAP_ESH_INITIAL_SETUP_WRK_CLIENT.
entry.content: During the step Create and Index Connectors I am getting an error message saying 'Background job STCTM_20240723123215.0480230/18021500 is aborted; see task log for details'. The job is getting cancelled due to GETWA_NOT_ASSIGNED runtime error during this step. I am trying to configure Fiori system.

I already tried several other Package from SAPHOSTAGENT, the Java Package, SAPJVM, etc., but still the same Problem. The Log of the Instance:

It is even not possible to stop or start the jstart over OS. Only if I kill the Process and try to start Instance 01, it gets the Status "Synchronising Binaries" and "Stopped" after that. Is there any known Mistake or similar?

Thank you for your Interest 😉

entry.title: Re: WM Managed-SLOC to SLOC transfer (Requirement: Same Source and Destination Stor Bin)
entry.content: Hi,

entry.title: Re: How delivery type is being determined in S/4HANA Publ...
entry.content:
Hi Anupam,

in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public edition there is pre-delivered content such as sales order types, delivery types and item categories. These best practises are defined in so called scope items. All of them including description and test scripts can be found in SAP For Me - Process Navigator.

Customers cannot create fundamental, process related settings on their own. So you cannot create new sales order types, new delivery types or new item categories.

The right approach in Public Cloud implementation projects is checking the scope items for processes you need like BD9 for Sell from Stock. Here used order types, item categories and delivery type is explained.

Regards,

Doreen

entry.title: Re: WM Managed-SLOC to SLOC transfer (Requirement: Same Source and Destination Stor Bin)
entry.content: Hi, Does this solution is working?

entry.title: Re: How to you remove Action links in Adapt UI
entry.content:
I guess the misunderstanding is due to the different terminology and team setup we use. You see, in transition from traditional ECC environment to Fiori, our Development and Security teams have the following setup. (And this is pretty common among all public sector clients around here):

The Security team needs to be a separate entity from Fiori UX team, and they are responsible for all roles/authorizations in Fiori and SAPGUI. No one in Fiori UX team is allowed access to PFCG or SU01 or other security related transactions. And the security team does not get involved in the design of catalogs and apps, they just control access, they don't get involved in business requirements or design.

So what you refer to "whole role design" is really divided into two processes:

  1. Fiori UX team (our team) develops custom apps or adapts SAP apps, maintains catalogs, target mappings, spaces and pages (using AppManager, Content Manager, and all the tools you mentioned)
  2. Then passes it on to Security team to build business roles and authorizations, and assign roles to end users (using PFCG, SU01,...)

These are two completely separate teams and separate processes.

So the case of this question, if the Action Links are controlled by target-mappings in the BCs, then it's our team (the Fiori UX dev team) that can remove them from the BC's and set up the action links based on user requirements. But if the Action Links are driven by roles/authorizations, then it becomes a Security team's task who only work with PFCG, SU24, etc.

entry.title: Re: Sloc to sloc against the bin to bin transfer
entry.content:
Is your question related to LE-WM or EWM?

On one hand side, you have 3-chars warehouse number and write about movement types, which suggests LE-WM. On the other, you have tagged the question with EWM. So which one is that LE-WM or EWM?

entry.title: Creating namespace using 'AIF/CUST' Tcode giving 'This function is not Possible' Error.
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

I am trying to create a namespace for a Proxy, but when I try to enter into transaction, its giving the following errors, any idea how these can be solved ?

/n/AIF/CUST : Tcode AIF/CUST does not exist

/AIF/CUST : This function is not possible.

 

Is this an error with this tcode not configured in my SAP System. Help appreciated. Thanks !

entry.title: PATCH ODATA API call to update UserLockedIndicator Field in Entityset BusinessUserCollection in C4C
entry.content:
I want to use ODATA Receiver Adapter to update the value of a field called UserLockedIndicator to true. For this purpose, I need to invoke Entity BusinessUserCollection in C4C. ObjectID is Key field for it which i have already read using GET operation in previous step. Now I want to use this Object ID from Exchange property of last Content modifier and make a PATCH call.

XML Payload in previous Content modifier Body = 

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<entry xml:base="https://my362199.crm.ondemand.com/sap/c4c/odata/v1/c4codataapi/" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2005/Atom" xmlns:m="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata" xmlns:d="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices">
<category term="c4codata.BusinessUser" scheme="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/scheme"/>
<content type="application/xml">
<m:properties>
<d:UserLockedIndicator>true</d:UserLockedIndicator>
</m:properties>
</content>
</entry>

I am getting error in IFlow for ODATA receiver adapter = com.thoughtworks.xstream.security.ForbiddenClassException: java.util.Map$Entry

entry.title: SAP Tech Night Melbourne on 28th Aug 2024
entry.content:
Our friends at AWS have been kind enough to provide a place to host the second tech night.

Its not too late to present at the tech night. 

Location:         555 Collins Street, Melbourne.

  •      When you enter the building, please proceed up the Escalators or Stairs to Level 1.
  •       On Level 1 there is an Amazon Security desk where you will need to sign in.
  •      Please bring photo ID along as this will be required for the registration process.

Please register your interest with the below link, will help us with the count. 

https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-inside-track/sap-melbourne-tech-night-aug-2024/ev-p/13766682

 

The third and final one for this year will mostly be in Oct details to come soon. 

Cheers,

SAP Community

entry.title: Re: How can I use the CICX billing type
entry.content:
Hi,

you can also check a similar community post regarding mentioned billing types: https://community.sap.com/t5/sales-q-a/how-to-register-billing-types-cix1-cix5-and-cicx/qaq-p/13689151

Billing Type CICX is the standard type for invoice cancellation for cancel invoices of type CIX1. To cancel an invoice of type CIX1 you can use App 'Manage Billing Documents' or you can use the ODATA API 'Billing Document - Read, Cancel, GetPDF'.

Please refer to SAP API Hub: https://api.sap.com/api/API_BILLING_DOCUMENT_SRV/overview

entry.title: SAP RAP(Restful ABAP) Standard Table With Draft Table Problem
entry.content:
We are creating an app that SAP RAP and exclusive locks with DRAFT functions.

In general, greenfield implementation using CBO is not a big problem

 

One question arose during the implementation of Brownfield using Standard Objects.

 

CRUD of the Standard Table with BAPI etc through the Unmanaged implementation seems possible, but... what should I do with the lock mechanism?

 

I understand that RAP should use DRAFT table based on Durablelock because odata Rest API is stateless.

 

To Use this DRAFT feature, I understand that the LAST_CHANGED_AT field needs to be added to the model entity

 

At this time, I realized that the standard table does not have the last_changed_AT field.

 

For example, when we use that EKKO EKPO app with a scenario to update through BAPI. It is possible to implement without considering the draft function, but if i want to use the draft function, it seems impossible to implement without adding LAST CHANGED AT to the standard table

 

Am I making a mistake? I'm sure there's a way, but I'm not sure. Please help me, everyone

 

#RAP ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model

entry.title: Re: Cantidad máxima en pedidos de ventas (SD)
entry.content:
Regards

What is the maximum possible number of items in a sales order?

is there any configuration?

entry.title: Re: Memory limit in jobscheduler instance
entry.content:
Hello Jibbril,

In the official Cloud Foundry documentation you can find the optional parameters you can provide when you create a CF Task: https://v3-apidocs.cloudfoundry.org/version/3.172.0/index.html#create-a-task

These parameters can be added when you are creating a Schedule for a CF task from the Job Scheduler Dashboard. There is a text area "Options(JSON)" in the "Create Schedule" popup in which you can provide the parameters in JSON format. For example, if you'd like to execute the CF task with 1500 MB allocated memory, you can write in the "Options(JSON)" text:

{"memory_in_mb": 1500}

Job Scheduler instance memory is not related to the memory used to execute CF tasks, it is a matter of Cloud Foundry itself. The Job Scheduling service executes the CF tasks as it sends requests to the CF API and the service can pass JSON data with the optional parameters.

I hope this will help.

Best regards,

Nikoleta

entry.title: Re: Is there any possible way to do a calculation in SAC...
entry.content:
Hello @sabananthan 

what you would like to do, is the so called Blending, see:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/blending-models-with-sap-analytics-cloud/ba-p/13502841

But the problem as of now is, this exists only in the Classic Story design, not the Optimized Design Experience, so far.

It is 50:50, if this will be taken over into the ODE in 2025, before the Classic Stories will expire.

BR, Martin

entry.title: SSAM2310 Android Image rotates 90degrees
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

we are using SSAM2310 on Android & iOS.

Now when I click on the image capture button, there is a take photo option on func loc, equipment, notification or work order.

When I click on it - after taking a photo, in the editor it shows me the object (image) 90 degrees rotated.

On Android it turns 90degrees on iOS not.

Does anybody know how to fix this issue?

Regards

Björn

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud - Sum
entry.content:
Hello @dsim98 

sorry, but only reading your description does not really visualize the problem to me?!

If you have a CDS Query built on a CDS Cube, then you can put annotations to your key figures for aggregation, see: https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/bwplaolap/3361385699.html#CDSviews:HowTouseinBWcontexts-Aggregation

So why would more than 1 record be hidden in a SAC table? I don't get this point.

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: Graphical Warehouse Layout in SAP EWM
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Please be informed that this feature works only on SAP GUI For Windows not working in Web GUI or SAP GUI For Java.

Best Regards,
Dimo

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 Flexibility: Adapting UIs for Specific User Roles
entry.content:
Hi @kirilin 

For our sales clerks, we need to remove the "Create Sales Orders" and "Change Sales Orders" from the list of action links. These users are not allowed to change or create, just display.

Using the Adapt UI (or key-user variants) that you mention in this blog, we can remove buttons and fields on a page, but we cannot remove Action Links. Adapt UI does not provide the capability to remove action links in variants. You can hide them, but the user can simply click on "More Links" and bring them back.

So my question is, how does a Fiori Administrator remove unwanted action links from an SAP app?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: How to add two custom tabs in Delivery?
entry.content: The LE_SHP_TAB_CUST_ITEM BAdI allows to add a single tab to delivery item screen. However you can nest as many custom tabs as you want inside. You can implemented tabs within a tab, similar to "Accounting 1" view of material master:

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK - push notifications and other issues
entry.content:
For #a, use step 1 to 2 from the  push-customclient_tutorial .

I tried this option a and followed step 1 and 2 for standard MDK client which I had already generated using cloud build job. But I don't see any 'push registration success' message when I launch the app.

I even tried to run another cloud build job and installed the app again by the latest binaries but no use. I don't see any device registration information in mobile services aswell.  

Is it because there is no step to add 'google-services.json' file for standard MDK client ? Please throw some light here Jitendra_Kansal .

entry.title: Re: Project Coding Mask Visibility in Project Definition...
entry.content: Start by entering the Project ID in the top box, if your entry is covered by a defined coding mask if will show up.

entry.title: Re: SAP Enable Now error: configuration file could not be...
entry.content:
Hey João,
it feels a little less lonesome to know that we're not alone solving these issues. To be honest, I have just found the solution (for my case at least) just now.
The reason why it this error popped up in my case was because I might have accidentally set the "Starting Library Automatically" with a particular group (the first picture attached). 

When I set it back to default (the second picture below), it worked.


I still don't have a theoretical response why it did not work but maybe @karenperez and @DirkManuel might be able to help us - as they are SEN experts.
Good luck!
Best,
Anh

entry.title: Re: Troubleshooting SAP Certification discount code for special programs
entry.content:
@ThomasTQ - It looks like that page is for an activation code - not a campaign code. 

This code should be applied during the checkout process. Please check the guide on how to redeem it: https://training.sap.com/help-center/faq/how-to-use-a-campaign-code-during-an-online-booking

entry.title: BOM not getting completely exploded in Planned Order/ Production Order
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am currently facing a problem, where it seems the BOM is not getting fully exploded when creating planned orders with MRP. The planned order only shows me 2 components of 5. Only after I click explode BOM, the other 3 materials appear in the component tab.

The BOM used is for a conifurable product. When creating planned order for another variant of this product, all components appear correctly initally in the planned order.

Can someone guide me in the direction of where I need to check?

 

Thanks

entry.content:
Hello,

I need to extract data from SAP Ariba to create analytics in Power BI.
I have Azure Data Factory (ADF) and want to check if SAP Ariba can be integrated with ADF?

When I searched for SAP, these are the connections that I am currently getting:

Does SAP Ariba could be in one of these services?
Or is it not compatible with ADF yet?

Could someone please help me? Any help will be much appreciated.

entry.title: SAP ERP-EWM-DM integration issues.
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts,

We tried to integrate SAP embedded EWM with SAP DM. The connection for master data works between SAP S/4 HANA & DM works fine( At least we think it's fine) because we can able to see the order download in SAP integration message dashboard.

1#. 

But after download, everything shows as failed, for example messages such as "Production Order PRT Download", "Order Status Sync (RMES)", "EWM Staging Request" shows as failed status. 

2#.

3#.

4#.

5#. 

 

 

We already checked the complete integration regarding  this page " Connecting to EWM in SAP S/4HANA 2021 | SAP Help Portal" but we could not able to resolve the issue.

6#.

As per SAP standard process as soon as Production order is released and WM Staging is executed, the order should appear in "Manage Staging 2.0 app" in SAP DM. But it's not the case.

Along with that we see PPF actions warning in /SCWM/PMR

7#

 

If some one could able to help in this issue would be great.

entry.title: AFO Tabs Not Recognizing Connection to BW - Seeking Assistance
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am assisting a user who is encountering an issue with SAP Analysis for Office (AFO) where the tabs do not appear to recognize that they are AFO tabs, and are supposed to be connecting to BW.

The issue still exists even after following the steps to manually establish connections, which can be found here: Most common issues with Analysis for Office 2.8 SP... - SAP Community

After attempting to manually connect, the sources now show up in the Analysis window, which wasn't the case previously, but the data doesn't act like AFO data should. Double-clicking on the data, for example, does not initiate the standard drill-down or filtering functions.

We've tried rearranging the tabs, but it only fixes part of the problem. It appears that the information is not fully represented as AFO data. Has anyone else encountered this problem before, or does anyone know how to fix it?

 

Any help or guidance on this issue would be greatly appreciated.

 

Thank you,

Liz M

 

#SAP #SAP AFO

entry.title: Override back button on FLP
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm trying to override the back button behavior on Sap Build Workzone. My application is Fiori Elements with Fiori Freestyle with odata v4. I want to raise an exception when a user is in the Object Page in edit mode and clicks on the back button. I tried the suggestions here https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/flp-nav-back-button-issue/qaq-p/12142325/comment-id/4538564#M4538564. But didn't work for me. I tried using this part:

this.getOwnerComponent().getService("ShellUIService").then(function(oShellService) {
    oShellService.setBackNavigation(function() {
        //either do nothing to disable it, or add your own nav back logic for having the navigation
    });
});

In the onAterRendering method of the Object Page controller, but it doesn't enter the setBackNavigation function. Can someone help with this issue.

 

Thanks,

Violina

entry.title: Re: A suggestion on how to approach networking and a career search in the SAP ecosystem
entry.content: @KunalBansal - I noticed your interview tips in the career corner! Maybe you might have something to add here for the beginner audience! 😊

entry.title: SENIOR BERATER (M/W/D) SAP ANALYTICS CLOUD
entry.content:
Das wird Dein Tag

Als Senior Berater für SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) entwickelst und implementierst Du Lösungen im Bereich Reporting und Planung mit SAC. Du analysierst Kundenanforderungen und bereitest diese zur Konzeption und Erstellung entsprechender Reports und effizienter Planungsprozesse auf. Darüber hinaus führst Du Workshops und Schulungen für Reporting- und Planungsanwendungen in SAC durch. Du überführst bestehende Lösungen in SAC, arbeitest eigenständig an Kundenprojekten, unterstützt das Team und trägst zur Kundengewinnung bei. Zudem baust du Prototypen auf dem firmeneigenen SAP-System auf und förderst den Wissenstransfer im Team. Du spielst eine zentrale Rolle bei der erfolgreichen Implementierung von SAP Analytics Cloud.

Du bist bei uns richtig mit

  • abgeschlossenem Wirtschafts- oder Informatikstudium oder einer vergleichbaren Qualifikation
  • > 5 Jahre Erfahrung als Berater im SAP Analytics Umfeld (BW, BO, SAC) oder als interner Anwendungsbetreuer
  • Verständnis für die Unternehmensprozesse und deren Abbildung in SAP
  • tiefreichenden Kenntnissen in ABAP, Java Script und SQL S4 Debugging sowie Expertise in der Implementierung von Lösungen im Bereich SAP BW und SAP S/4HANA (Datenmodellierung , ETL-Prozesse, Berechtigungen etc.)
  • Erfahrung in der Leitung von IT-Projekten und Expertise im Projektmanagement
  • sehr guten Deutschkenntnissen in Wort und Schrift
  • Eigeninitiative, Verantwortungsbewusstsein, Spaß an Teamarbeit, Offenheit & Kommunikationsfreude

Darauf kannst Du Dich freuen

  • volle Flexibilität bei Arbeitszeit, Einsatzrate, Arbeitsort
  • attraktive Gesamtvergütung von 80-120 TEUR (inkl. Bonus)
  • variables Urlaubskonzept, Workation, Sabbatical
  • cooler Standort im Design Offices
  • Mobilitätspauschale oder Firmenwagen
  • MacBook, iPhone und iPad
  • Umzugskosten-Zuschuss

Und das ist längst nicht alles – es warten noch weitere Benefits auf Dich.

entry.title: Re: S4HC- Create the billing document for down payment
entry.content:
Hi Haily,

In your example you will have 2 customer invoices:

  • one down payment request invoice (billing type FAZ) and
  • one closing invoice (billing type F2).

The down payment invoice FAZ is handled differently in FI. It leads to down payment request FI posting with special G/L indicator, means the incoming payment is posted as FI down payment. This FI posting is cleared, when creating the final invoice and posting final incoming payment.

It is very detailed explained in this blog: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/how-to-understand-the-fi-postings-made-in-sd-down-payment-scenario/ba-p/13345325

In case you want 2 customer invoices (billing type F2) you can choose Partial Billing. In this case you don't have a downpayment. It is handled in FI as 2 invoices.

Regards,

Doreen

entry.title: Re: Extracting more than 5000 records from SE16/SE16N.
entry.content:
Check below steps, if this works:

1. Log in to SAP system.
2. Open transaction code SE16N.
3. Enter table name and click "Display."
4. Click "Settings" in table display screen.
5. Select "User Parameters" from drop-down menu.
6. Search for "MAX_SEL" parameter.
7. Create "MAX_SEL" if not available.
8. Enter parameter and desired record limit.
9. Save changes.

After this, you should normally able to export more than 5000 records from SE16/SE16N.

entry.title: Re: Where is info about purchasing/downloading "Enterprise Connect Data Access" ?
entry.content: EDCA / Replication Server Heterogeneous Edition are no longer avaialble. See https://me.sap.com/notes/3408368 and https://me.sap.com/notes/2702069

entry.title: ABAP CDS View date parameter
entry.content:
hello All,

how to create a parameter in cds view that i must be able to choose either a month, a week or a date using a single date parameter 

the parameter should show the aggregation of the date as year->month->week->day

is there any way to achieve this ?

Thanks in Advance

ABAP Development

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 Flexibility: Adapting UIs for Specific User Roles
entry.content:
@RaminSyou're right. "Adapt UI" only hides UI elements; it doesn't actually remove them.

Perhaps some context can help clarify how Action Links are created. In this scenario, Action Links (also called Smart Links) are automatically generated based on the roles or catalogs assigned to your end users. So, you don't need to tweak the UI to achieve your goal. Instead, you should adjust the role assignment or your catalog's configuration, such as removing the mentioned apps from your catalog. Both tasks are typically handled by a Fiori Launchpad admin.

While I'm not a Fiori Launchpad expert, this documentation might be helpful to get you started.  Alternatively, you could always post a question in the community targeted to Fiori Launchpad experts or to the application developers.
